title: Woman arrested for fatal Sonskynvallei stabbing
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 42-year-old woman has been arrested in connection with the fatal stabbing of a man (40) in Sonskynvallei on Saturday evening, 31 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 42-year-old woman has been arrested in connection with the fatal stabbing of a man (40) in Sonskynvallei on Saturday evening, 31 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Southern Cape Police’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Chris Spies, said the reports indicated the two had been a couple."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They had reportedly been involved in an argument at about 19:30 on Saturday evening when allegedly she stabbed him, in his chest with a knife.","html":"They had reportedly been involved in an argument at about 19:30 on Saturday evening when allegedly she stabbed him, in his chest with a knife."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Medical personnel declared the man dead. The Da Gamaskop Police arrested the woman and confiscated the knife.","html":"Medical personnel declared the man dead. The Da Gamaskop Police arrested the woman and confiscated the knife."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She is expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court once she has been charged.","html":"She is expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court once she has been charged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Woman arrested for fatal Sonskynvallei stabbing
